title: Definition
doc_html:
TITLE VII.  PARENT AND CHILD

CHAPTER 1.  FILIATION

Art. 178.  Definition

Filiation is the legal relationship between a child and his parent.

Acts 2009, No. 3, §1, eff. June 9, 2009.
